fields.name: Squat con bilanciere
fields.description: A fundamental compound exercise that targets the quadriceps, glutes, and hamstrings.

fields.name: Panca piana con bilanciere
fields.description: A classic upper body compound movement focusing on the chest, anterior deltoids, and triceps.

fields.name: Stacco da terra
fields.description: A powerful full-body lift targeting the posterior chain, including the hamstrings, glutes, and lower back.

fields.name: Curl con manubri
fields.description: An isolation exercise designed to target and build strength in the biceps.

fields.name: Shoulder press con manubri
fields.description: An overhead pressing movement that primarily targets the deltoids and triceps.

fields.name: Lat machine avanti
fields.description: An upper-body pulling exercise that builds width and strength in the latissimus dorsi muscles.

fields.name: Leg press
fields.description: A machine-based lower body exercise that isolates the quadriceps, glutes, and hamstrings without loading the spine.

fields.name: Pushdown cavi per tricipiti
fields.description: An isolation movement performed on a cable machine to target the lateral and medial heads of the triceps.

fields.name: Affondi con manubri
fields.description: A unilateral lower body exercise that improves balance while working the quads, glutes, and hamstrings.

fields.name: Rematore con bilanciere
fields.description: A compound horizontal pulling exercise that builds thickness in the upper and mid back.
